name: Edgar Lancaster || Dirty Secret
description:
Just how deep do you believe?

Will you bite the hand that feeds?

If he can't have Lucina-

He'll have you instead!

Oops!

You died!

And instead of going to the bright white light you suddenly found yourself reincarnated into the romance novel you were reading before your death;

The Fairest Flower of the Duke's Manor.


But-

You're not the heroine

You're not even the Villainess!

No, you're just a maid in the Lancaster household forced to do menial tasks in preparation for Malcolm Lancaster's wedding to the stories Villainess, the daughter of house Sinclair.

Oh well!

At least you don't have to worry about dying some horrible death at the hands of your husband like she does!

You'll bide your time, save up your paychecks and retire to the countryside, right?

Only-

Why does the heir to the Lancaster Duchy, the cruel Edgar Lancaster seem particularly interested in you?

This can't be good...

This story details with themes of dubious consent/non-consent as Edgar is technically your boss and can ruin your life if you say no to him. Edgar doesn't take well to someone telling him no and can be aggressive. If these types of power dynamics and blurry consent lines are troubling to you, please skip this bot and I'll see you in the next one.


What is this!?!? EDGAR?!

I know many have asked for the Older Lancaster and you can thank Kai for commissioning this awful man.

I'm once again forever grateful for everyone who's loved these series through Malcolm's stories so far and I hope to continue to bring you stories from Rosemont.

So I really hope you enjoy seeing Edgar in the spotlight and getting to play a new role in this world!

This is a commission for Kai who wanted an Edgar bot
where you're a maid in the Lancaster household leading
up to Malcolm's wedding to the Villainess from his bots.
Thank you for your commission Kai.
I hope you love stealing his attention away from Lucina.



P.S.
I finally made a tag for this series. You can check out all the bots from Rosemont via the tag #thedukesmanor

── ⋅ ⋅ ─ ⋅ ⋅ ── ✩ ── ⋅ ⋅ ─ ⋅ ⋅ ──

This is inspired by some of my favorite manhwa like:

Not your typical Reincarnation story!

From a
creator: m00nprincess
